stoichiometric_equation: atp_c + diphmva_c --> adp_c + pi_c + h_c + ipdp_c + co2_c
notes: NEW REACTION. S. cerevisiae MVD1 (BBa_25R9ACX). pi_c (HPO4 2-) + h_c balances charge at physiological pH 7.3. pi_c and h_c are native iCre1355 metabolites; not in alter_metabolites.csv.

iCre1355 already has R_IDI (Cre08.g381800.t1.1 OR Cre11.g467544.t1.1). IDLI should be added as OR to R_IDI GPR instead of a new reaction. alter.py should patch the GPR of R_IDI rather than add ALT_IDLI as a standalone reaction.
